template_improvements.change: Added guidance on framework-specific APIs (jest.fn vs vitest.fn, $localize setup)
template_improvements.reasoning: Prevents test setup errors when working across Nx projects with different testing frameworks

template_improvements.change: Documented withHooks onInit pattern for syncing browser state after SSR hydration; included localStorage example
template_improvements.reasoning: SSR hydration bugs are hard to debug in production; this pattern prevents silent state divergence

template_improvements.section: Mock Dependencies for Root Component Tests
template_improvements.change: Added pattern for mocking all injected stores in TestBed; explained ripple effect
template_improvements.reasoning: Prevents cascading test failures when modifying the root component

template_improvements.change: Documented risks of short string replacements with examples; added best practices for specific patterns
template_improvements.reasoning: Prevents subtle bugs from unintended string replacements that are hard to spot in review

template_improvements.change: Added guidance on when to use hreflang (parallel routes only); documented blog slug issue
template_improvements.reasoning: Prevents broken hreflang links that confuse search engines and hurt SEO for localized sites

process_improvements_applied.improvement: When injecting a store into app root, immediately run app tests and update mocks
process_improvements_applied.impact: Prevents cascading test failures during subsequent development

process_improvements_applied.improvement: Before running large replace_all operations, test on a single file or limited scope
process_improvements_applied.impact: Catches collision bugs before they spread across codebase

process_improvements_applied.improvement: Explicitly document which signals depend on browser APIs; mark with comments
Ads/monetization features should include: sitemap generation, legal pages, GDPR consent, NPA mode
process_improvements_applied.impact: Ensures compliance + SEO requirements are not missed in future work

architectural_patterns_documented.name: SSR Hydration Pattern: Browser State Sync
architectural_patterns_documented.description: For signals that depend on browser APIs, use withHooks onInit to detect browser environment and update state after hydration
architectural_patterns_documented.success_example: AdsStore now syncs consent state on client after SSR
architectural_patterns_documented.when_to_use: Any store signal that reads from localStorage, sessionStorage, window, or document

architectural_patterns_documented.name: Static File Serving Pattern: URL Rewrite vs sendFile
architectural_patterns_documented.description: For i18n + static files at root, prefer Express middleware rewrite + express.static over sendFile
architectural_patterns_documented.success_example: robots.txt served at root without security concerns, CodeQL clean
architectural_patterns_documented.when_to_use: Static files that need to be served at root path in i18n apps

architectural_patterns_documented.name: Sitemap Multi-Language Pattern
architectural_patterns_documented.description: Generate sitemap with hreflang only for routes with parallel structure. Skip hreflang for routes with language-specific slugs
architectural_patterns_documented.success_example: Sitemap generated with hreflang for static pages, excluded for blog
architectural_patterns_documented.when_to_use: Multi-language sites with some parallel routes and some content-specific routes

technical_insights_recorded.insight: Separate cookie consent (pus_cookie_consent) from analytics consent (pus_analytics_consent). AdsStore hydrates consent on browser init via withHooks.
Non-personalized ads (NPA) don't require GDPR opt-in but require a consent notice. Banner alone satisfies this.
For i18n + static files, store files in locale folder and use Express rewrite middleware. Simpler and more secure than sendFile.
Sitemap generation can be wired as a dependsOn in Nx build configuration, ensuring it runs before web:build
